title: A String, A Pillar, Remembering the Years
description: A woman is reborn to the day she and her sister were both to be married. She decides to swap fates with her sister to protect her from a dangerous marriage.
context:
Title: A String, A Pillar, Remembering the Years
Description: A woman is reborn to the day she and her sister were both to be married. She decides to swap fates with her sister to protect her from a dangerous marriage.

EXT. COUNTRY ROAD - DAY

MU MIANMIAN walks along a country road, suitcase in hand. Her MOTHER and FATHER follow behind.

MOTHER
Mianmian! Stop!

Mother catches up, grabs Mianmian's arm.

MOTHER
Five years with a good man—you throw it away for some island soldier? What kind of daughter—

MU MIANMIAN
The kind who keeps her word.

Mianmian pulls free and boards a waiting minibus. Mother pounds on the door.

MOTHER
Mianmian! Mianmian! Get off that bus! You'll regret this!

The minibus pulls away. Mother chases, shouting.

MOTHER
Mianmian!

INT. MINIBUS - DAY

Mianmian watches her mother recede. Her knuckles whiten on the suitcase handle.

DRIVER
You sure, miss? That ferry doesn't come back 'til tomorrow.

MU MIANMIAN
I'm sure.

She looks at her hands—smooth, young. A scar on her palm she hasn't earned yet.

INT. BEDROOM - DAY

ON SCREEN: THREE HOURS EARLIER

Mianmian wakes with a gasp, clutching her chest. She touches her face—smooth. No wrinkles. She sits up, breathing hard.

A red wedding dress hangs on the wall. Beside it—a 1980 calendar, today's date circled.

The door opens. Mother enters with steaming dumplings.

MOTHER
Finally awake! Today of all days—your sister's already dressed. Eat, then get ready. The accountant's family will be here soon.

Mother sets down the dumplings. Mianmian stares at them.

MU MIANMIAN
(whispering)
The accountant...

MOTHER
What's wrong? You begged to marry him!

Mother notices Mianmian's fixed gaze on the calendar.

MOTHER
You forget your own wedding day?

Mianmian's fingers find the scar on her palm. Her eyes harden.

MU MIANMIAN
No. I remember everything.

MONTAGE - MU MIANMIAN'S MEMORIES

A) INT. OFFICE - DAY (FLASHBACK) - Older Mianmian signs divorce papers. LIU YUNQING won't meet her eyes.

B) INT. LIVING ROOM - DAY (FLASHBACK) - Mianmian's SISTER smiles in a wedding photo with stern soldier SHEN HUANIAN.

C) INT. POLICE STATION - DAY (FLASHBACK) - Mianmian, now 60s, identifies her sister's body. A PHOTO of a young, delicate woman flashes on a bulletin board. DETECTIVE (V.O.): "...suspected accomplice..."
continuation:
INT. LIVING ROOM - DAY

Mianmian stands before her sister's door. Enters.

INT. SISTER'S BEDROOM - DAY

SISTER sits on the bed, folding a wedding veil with trembling hands. She looks up—Mianmian in the doorway, still in nightclothes.

SISTER
Mianmian? Why aren't you—

Mianmian crosses, takes her sister's hands.

MU MIANMIAN
Switch with me.

SISTER
What?

MU MIANMIAN
I'll marry Shen Huanian. You take the accountant.

SISTER
(shocked)
Have you lost your mind? Shen Huanian's dangerous—he has that woman, that—

MU MIANMIAN
That "green tea" viper he's kept since childhood? I know. That's why I'm going.

Mianmian squeezes her sister's hands.

MU MIANMIAN
She killed you, sister. In a life you never lived. I'm not letting it happen again.

SISTER
(whispering)
How can you know that?

MU MIANMIAN
Because I died old and alone, and woke up with a second chance. I know how this ends. Let me rewrite it.

Mianmian forces a smile.

MU MIANMIAN
Besides. Grandfather never specified which granddaughter. And me against some delicate island girl? Don't you remember who won every fight?

She throws a precise jab at the air.

SISTER
(laughing through tears)
You were eleven.

MU MIANMIAN
And undefeated.

Mianmian picks up Shen Huanian's wedding clothes—red silk like armor.

MU MIANMIAN
I'll send word when I'm settled. If it goes wrong... I'll handle it. Revenge for revenge, grievance for grievance. But she won't touch our family.

MU MIANMIAN
(softening)
Please, sister.

SISTER studies her, sees something unshakeable. Finally—she nods.

SISTER
(deadly serious)
You come back to me.

Mianmian embraces her, fierce and brief.

MU MIANMIAN
I promise.

INT. MINIBUS / EXT. COUNTRY ROAD - DAY

BACK TO PRESENT

The minibus rattles down the road. Mother runs alongside, hoarse.

MOTHER
Mianmian! Mianmian, come back!

Mianmian leans out the window. Wind tears at her hair.

MU MIANMIAN
(calling out)
Mother! I'm keeping my promise!

She holds up her scarred palm. Mother can't see it, but Mianmian needs her to witness the gesture.

MU MIANMIAN
I'll be home for Spring Festival!

The bus accelerates. Mother stops, doubled over. She watches the bus disappear into dust and light.

Mianmian settles back, eyes forward. Her hand rests on the suitcase—heavy with a dead woman's wedding clothes and a living woman's fury.

title: Revenge of the Betrayed General's Daughter
description: A woman is tortured and murdered by her lover and his mistress after her family helped him rise to power.
context:
Title: Revenge of the Betrayed General's Daughter
Description: A woman is tortured and murdered by her lover and his mistress after her family helped him rise to power.

INT. WOODSHED - NIGHT

In the dim woodshed, flames flicker in a brazier.

GU YANHANG, in blood-stained white robes, wears an iron collar and kneels in the dirt. Before her stands PEI ZHI in black, his face unreadable. Her father, FATHER GU, bleeds in shackles nearby.

A RED-ROBED WOMAN holds a wine cup, watching.

GU YANHANG
(quiet, broken)
Pei Zhi. Let him die at home. Not like this.

PEI ZHI lifts fire tongs from the brazier—a branding iron glows at their tip, his house sigil.

GU YANHANG
(horrified recognition)
That brand... you swore it would never touch my flesh.

PEI ZHI presses it to FATHER GU's throat. The sizzle cuts her words.

GU YANHANG
(screams)

GU YANHANG
(choking on smoke)
Father! Shuobei—was it worth it? Worth ten winters of false vows?

PEI ZHI's hand trembles once. He drives a wooden spike through FATHER GU's chest.

GU YANHANG
(collapses)

PEI ZHI
continuation:
(flat)
Your name was the only thing worth keeping.

GU YANHANG
(over her father's body)
Then you were never worthy of it.

RED-ROBED WOMAN
She's learned too late. Just like her father.

RED-ROBED WOMAN produces a poison vial.

PEI ZHI
(hand out)
Give it to me.

GU YANHANG looks up—hope or horror, unclear.

PEI ZHI
(leaning close, pouring)
Sleep now.

His thumb brushes her lip—a ghost of old habit—then forces the poison down. RED-ROBED WOMAN laughs.

QUICK FLASHBACK MONTAGE:
- GU YANHANG carves PEI ZHI's sigil into a shield, laughing.
- She kisses his thumb as he traces her smile.
- Their foreheads touch; his hand at her neck—not a collar, but a caress.

BACK TO PRESENT:

GU YANHANG (V.O.)
(venom-quiet)
Pei Zhi... that thumb. I'll take it from you myself.

She convulses, eyes fixed on his. Dies unclosed, unforgiven.

title: The Marquis Lady's Rebirth
description: A woman betrayed by her husband and killed in a frozen apocalypse is reborn to the days before disaster strikes, determined to stockpile resources and seek revenge.
context:
Title: The Marquis Lady's Rebirth
Description: A woman betrayed by her husband and killed in a frozen apocalypse is reborn to the days before disaster strikes, determined to stockpile resources and seek revenge.

EXT. NINGYUAN MARQUIS MANOR ENTRANCE - DAY

The manor entrance is piled high with sacks and crates. SERVANTS busily carry goods into the manor.

SERVANT A
(adjusting slipping crate)
Steady now!

SERVANT B
(grunting under weight)
What's in these? Rocks?

SERVANT C
(to Servant D)
Third delivery this morning...

STEWARD (O.S.)
Mind the porcelain! Inside, quickly!

Several MERCHANTS and LADIES stand nearby, watching with growing alarm.

ONLOOKER A
(whispering)
That's the fifth grain merchant today.

ONLOOKER B
She bought out Chen's entire fur inventory. In summer!

ONLOOKER C
The Liu family just lost their daughter to her—paid triple for a dowry's worth of silk.

INT. NINGYUAN MARQUIS MANOR ENTRANCE - DAY

A MEDICINE MERCHANT rushes toward SU HUA, clutching a ledger.

MEDICINE MERCHANT
(breathless)
Lady Marquis, every herb from my shop—winter stock, fever tonics, wound salves. All delivered.

SU HUA, dressed in fine robes, holds a box filled with banknotes. She pulls out a stack without looking at the merchant.

SU HUA
The Liu Family Apothecary as well?

MEDICINE MERCHANT
(stammering)
They... they refused at first, but your price...

SU HUA places the notes in his hand and walks past, eyes fixed on the horizon.

SU HUA
Everything they have. By sundown.

The merchant bows repeatedly, backing away. The onlooking crowd erupts.

ONLOOKER D
The Liu shop too? That's half the city's medicine!

ONLOOKER E
She's emptied the granaries. What is she planning?

CLOTH SHOP OWNER
(to a companion)
She didn't even haggle. Just pointed at my most expensive furs and said 'all'.

MEDICINE MERCHANT
(joining them, wiping sweat)
Twelve years of stock. The rhubarb alone could supply an army.

CROWD
(shocked)
An army?

MEDICINE MERCHANT
(shaking his head)
In this heat? Most will spoil before autumn.

ONLOOKER F
Madness. Pure madness.

FEMALE ONLOOKER
(quietly)
They say the Marquis hasn't visited her chambers in months. Prefers that concubine from the Zhang household.

ONLOOKER G
Even grief doesn't excuse this.

ONLOOKER H
Alright, alright. Nothing to see.

The crowd gradually disperses. SU HUA stands in place, fingers trembling slightly as she touches a jade pendant at her throat.

SU HUA (V.O.)
Ten days. In ten days, this jade—and every coin I own—will be worthless. But these supplies...

FLASHBACK:
continuation:
EXT. EXECUTION GROUND - DAY

SU HUA and her family, wearing prisoner's garb, kneel in the dirt. SOLDIERS hold them at spearpoint.

SU HUA (V.O.)
The Duke of Dingguo's "treason." Ningyuan Manor implicated. Confiscated. Exiled.

NING YANSHAN emerges from the crowd, pointing at GENERAL SU.

NING YANSHAN
There! The General's seal—found in the Duke's study. Proof of their conspiracy!

GENERAL SU
(struggling against bonds)
Ning Yanshan! I treated you as a son!

NING YANSHAN
(cold)
You treated me as a fool.

The EXECUTIONER's blade rises. Blood splatters across Su Hua's cheek.

SU HUA
(screaming, voice cracking)
Father!

EXT. SNOWY ROAD - DAY

Heavy snow blankets a line of shackled prisoners. Frozen corpses dot the roadside.

SU HUA (V.O.)
We marched for ten days. Then winter came early.

A FIRE USER conjures flame, warming abusive GUARDS. An ICE USER freezes a prisoner's shackles to brittle cracking.

SU HUA (V.O.)
Some awakened. Most died.

SU HUA trudges forward, frostbitten, as prisoners collapse around her.

INT. CAVE - NIGHT

SU HUA lies weakly on frozen ground. NING YANSHAN enters with ABILITY USERS—scavengers with dead eyes.

NING YANSHAN
(to the Users)
She's General Su's daughter. Strong stock. Might survive the bonding.

ABILITY USER ONE
(grinning)
And if not?

NING YANSHAN
Then she dies like the rest.

He shoves SU HUA forward. She grabs his sleeve.

SU HUA
(whisper)
Why?

NING YANSHAN
(ripping away)
Your dowry was never enough.

The ABILITY USERS close in. SU HUA's scream echoes off stone.

END FLASHBACK.

EXT. NINGYUAN MARQUIS MANOR ENTRANCE - DAY

SU HUA's tears fall on the jade pendant. She closes her fist around it, then opens her hand. The pendant is gone.

SU HUA (V.O.)
Heaven gave me back the days. This time, I have the supplies. And soon—

SU HUA turns. A faint red mark glows on her forehead. She gestures. A nearby crate vanishes with a soft ripple of air.

SU HUA (V.O.)
—I will have the power.

title: Million Dollar Bride
description: A young woman is forced by her father to marry into a wealthy family to save her comatose mother, leading her to a reckless night that changes everything.
context:
Title: Million Dollar Bride
Description: A young woman is forced by her father to marry into a wealthy family to save her comatose mother, leading her to a reckless night that changes everything.

INT. BAR - NIGHT

MU XINGRAN sits alone at the bar counter, picks up a glass and drinks it in one gulp.

MU XINGRAN (V.O.)
Young master Li. The idiot prince of a golden cage. They trade my life for his comfort.

INT. MU FAMILY LIVING ROOM - DAY

FLASHBACK:

SHEN QIUHE, Mu Xingran's stepmother, is persuading MU WANQING.

SHEN QIUHE
The Li family offers what your mother needs. What you need. Think of it as preservation.

MU WANQING
A great opportunity to bring luck to an idiot? Why not let Mu Wanqing do it?

INT. BAR - NIGHT

Back to reality, MU XINGRAN drinks again, her eyes filled with pain.

INT. MU FAMILY LIVING ROOM - DAY

FLASHBACK:

MU ZHENGUO, Mu Xingran's father, points at MU WANQING and scolds her angrily.

MU ZHENGUO
Do you have no conscience? She's your own sister!

MU WANQING
(emotionally agitated)
Less than half a month after my mother's accident, the mistress had already moved in. This illegitimate daughter of yours is only one year younger than me. Speaking of conscience, in Jiangcheng if you rank second, who would dare claim first place?

MU ZHENGUO angrily slaps MU WANQING.

MU ZHENGUO
Ungrateful daughter. You will marry whether you like it or not. Otherwise, forget about your mother's medical expenses!
continuation:
INT. BAR - NIGHT

MU ZHENGUO (V.O.)
A half-dead vegetable, better off dead!

End of flashback. MU XINGRAN continues drinking at the bar.

A THUG approaches MU XINGRAN.

THUG
Little sister, all alone? Tell big brother what's troubling you.

The THUG puts his hand on MU XINGRAN's shoulder. In the distance on a sofa, LI SITING watches this scene coldly. A LI FAMILY RING gleams on his finger.

MU XINGRAN
(pushing him away)
Get lost!

THUG
(grabbing her again)
Where are you going? Let's find a place, and big brother will help you relax.

LI SITING stands up and walks over, grabbing the THUG's wrist.

THUG
Who the hell are you? Dare to ruin my fun?

LI SITING punches the THUG to the ground.

LI SITING
(coldly)
Get out!

The THUG flees in embarrassment. MU XINGRAN, drunk, falls into LI SITING's arms.

MU XINGRAN (V.O.)
I'm about to marry an idiot anyway. Can't I go crazy just once?

MU XINGRAN
(looking up at LI SITING)
Handsome.

LI SITING
What?

MU XINGRAN
(wrapping her arms around his neck)
Spend the night with me, how about it?

LI SITING
I'm not interested in you.

LI SITING tries to push her away, but MU XINGRAN holds on tighter.

MU XINGRAN
(whispering in his ear)
Not interested, or does the Li family not allow it?

LI SITING's eyes flash with anger, his expression provoked.

LI SITING
What do you know about my family?

MU XINGRAN
Enough to know they're buying what I'm selling.

She kisses him before he can respond.

TO BE CONTINUED

title: The Devil by My Side
description: A woman marries an older man for a dowry, only to endure abuse, betrayal, and ultimately a deadly conspiracy orchestrated by her husband and her best friend.
context:
Title: The Devil by My Side
Description: A woman marries an older man for a dowry, only to endure abuse, betrayal, and ultimately a deadly conspiracy orchestrated by her husband and her best friend.

INT. WEDDING BANQUET PRIVATE ROOM - DAY

HE RUOQING (20s) wears a red toast dress, serving tea to WANG MOTHER (50s). Her husband WANG CHANGLIN (40s) watches with detached amusement. Both sets of parents are present.

WANG MOTHER (accepting tea)
A daughter-in-law is family. You'll serve well.

He Ruoqing's smile doesn't reach her eyes.

INT. WEDDING BANQUET HALL - DAY

Wang Changlin's phone buzzes. He glances at the screen—ZHANG MEIZHEN's name visible—then at He Ruoqing, who looks away.

WANG CHANGLIN
(to He Ruoqing)
Business call.

He pockets the phone, screen-side in.

INT. WANG FAMILY HOUSE - DAY

He Ruoqing scrubs dishes. Her hands are raw. Wang Mother watches, unimpressed.

WANG MOTHER
My son married down. Remember your place.

Wang Changlin enters, smelling of alcohol. He grabs He Ruoqing's arm.

WANG CHANGLIN
Where's the money I gave you?

HE RUOQING
For groceries—

WANG CHANGLIN
(shoving her)
You think I don't know you steal?

INT. WANG FAMILY HOUSE - NIGHT

He Ruoqing curls on the sofa as Wang Changlin unbuckles his belt.

WANG CHANGLIN
(belt snapping)
Learn your lesson.

The blows land. He Ruoqing bites her lip, silent.

INT. UNDERGROUND CLINIC - DAY

He Ruoqing lies on a stained examination table, bleeding. The FEMALE DOCTOR (40s) shakes her head.

FEMALE DOCTOR
(to Wang Changlin)
She's lost the pregnancy. She needs rest, not more—

WANG CHANGLIN
It's just a child.

WANG MOTHER
She's young. She'll conceive again.

He Ruoqing turns her face to the wall, tears tracking down.
continuation:
INT. HE FAMILY HOUSE - DAY

He Ruoqing stands before her parents, clutching her bruised arm.

HE FATHER
Divorce? Over some arguments?

HE RUOQING
He hits me. I lost the baby—

HE FATHER
(slams table)
You endure! The dowry bought your brother's future!

HE MOTHER
Ruoqing, be reasonable.

He Ruoqing's younger brother HE BAOZHEN (20s) appears, hearing the raised voices.

HE BAOZHEN
Sis, what's wrong?

HE FATHER
Nothing! She's returning to her husband.

HE BAOZHEN
(breaking)
We used your dowry for my business. It failed. We're bankrupt.

HE RUOQING
(quietly)
How much?

HE BAOZHEN
Two hundred thousand. They'll take everything.

HE FATHER
You can't leave him. We need that money.

HE BAOZHEN
(pleading)
Sis, I didn't know. I'm sorry.

He produces a kitchen knife—not threatening, but desperate.

HE BAOZHEN
I'll end this. All of it.

HE FATHER
Baozhen!

HE BAOZHEN
(pointing knife at himself)
I ruined us. Let me fix it.

HE RUOQING
Stop!

She moves toward him. He shifts, knife now toward her.

HE BAOZHEN
(to their father)
Kneel! Beg her to stay, or I cut her first!

HE MOTHER
(screaming)
Baozhen, no!

He Ruoqing's father drops to his knees.

HE FATHER
Please. For your brother.

He Ruoqing walks out, leaving the knife clattering to the floor.

EXT. STREET - DAY

He Ruoqing sits at a bus stop, trembling. She scratches a lottery ticket from her purse—last month's purchase.

The numbers match. Not a million. Fifty thousand.

She laughs, a broken sound.

INT. BEDROOM - NIGHT

Wang Changlin and Zhang Meizhen lie tangled together. His phone shows a text: BANK ALERT: 50K DEPOSIT.

WANG CHANGLIN
She actually won.

ZHANG MEIZHEN
(kissing his neck)
Take it. Say it's joint property.

WANG CHANGLIN
Divorce would only get me half. This way...

ZHANG MEIZHEN
(smiling)
She'll give it willingly. For love.

INT. BATHTUB - NIGHT

He Ruoqing soaks in a tub, red candlelight flickering. Her phone shows texts from Wang Changlin: "Forgive me. Come home."

WANG CHANGLIN and Zhang Meizhen stand over her.

HE RUOQING
(weakly)
The water... feels strange...

WANG CHANGLIN
Just relax.

He Ruoqing's eyes flutter. She tries to stand, slips. Wang Changlin pushes her shoulders down.

HE RUOQING
(struggling)
I can't... breathe...

WANG CHANGLIN
(whispering)
For our future.

Zhang Meizhen holds her legs still. He Ruoqing's hands claw at the tub's edge, then go limp.

The water stills. Only candles remain lit.

title: A Dream Recalled
description: A woman confronts her treacherous husband who deceived her into marriage, stole her family's fortune, and now forces her into degradation.
context:
Title: A Dream Recalled
Description: A woman confronts her treacherous husband who deceived her into marriage, stole her family's fortune, and now forces her into degradation.

INT. DONGFANG MANSION - GRAND STAIRCASE - NIGHT

A woman in white (MEI PING) tumbles down the stairs, her body covered in blood. Chaos surrounds her as GUESTS cry out in alarm.

GUESTS (O.S.)
Something's happened!

INT. DONGFANG MANSION - SECOND FLOOR CORRIDOR - NIGHT

Lights blaze and festivities continue. JU XIANG and HUI NIANG flank MEI PING in the corridor.

JU XIANG
Madam, don't blame the master. You refuse to serve Lord Zhang - you're deliberately blocking the master's promotion.

MEI PING, covered in wounds with blood at the corner of her mouth, looks up defiantly at the upper floor. On the balcony above, her husband DONGFANG DE is intimate with another woman.

KANG RUI'ER supports MEI PING, pleading anxiously.

KANG RUI'ER
Sister, don't! Stop fighting with them.
continuation:
MEI PING
(shouting up at the balcony)
Dongfang De! You tricked me into marriage, seized my family's fortune, and drove my father to his death! Demoting me from wife to concubine wasn't enough - now you force me to entertain guests, paving the way for your promotion and wealth! Are you even human?

DONGFANG DE
(laughing from above)
I'm honoring you by doing so!

DONGFANG DE looks at the other maids and servants in the mansion.

DONGFANG DE
Look at the maids and servants in this household - which one hasn't served officials and nobles? As long as I'm pleased, even if I matched them with pigs, dogs, cattle, or horses, who would dare refuse? Guards!

Several GUARDS rush toward MEI PING and KANG RUI'ER.

DONGFANG DE descends from the upper floor and approaches MEI PING, who lies on the ground. He looks down at her condescendingly.

DONGFANG DE
Only you - you're the most disobedient of all.

MEI PING
(Quietly)
Good. I was listening.

title: Rebirth of the Villain Ex-Wife
description: A reader transmigrates into a novel as the villainous ex-wife who abandoned the male lead during his downfall, only to face karmic retribution when he rises again.
context:
Title: Rebirth of the Villain Ex-Wife
Description: A reader transmigrates into a novel as the villainous ex-wife who abandoned the male lead during his downfall, only to face karmic retribution when he rises again.

INT. BESIDE GARBAGE BINS - NIGHT

A stormy night with thunder and lightning.

A man rummages through a box of discarded lettuce.

JIANG YUMAN, ragged and soaked to the bone, hides behind a garbage bin. She takes a vegetable heart from the man and devours it hungrily, yet her face shows a satisfied smile.

A distant SHOUT echoes: "Check the alleys!"

A black Mercedes drives up and stops in the rain.

A man in a black suit with shiny leather shoes gets out. A BODYGUARD opens a black umbrella for him. This is FU JINGCHEN.

JIANG YUMAN sees him. The vegetable heart drops from her hand. Her eyes show shock.

FU JINGCHEN holds the umbrella, looking at her coldly.

JIANG YUMAN crawls toward him desperately, then stands up with a fawning smile on her face.

JIANG YUMAN
Fu Jingchen, they cleared your name. I knew they would. We can start over--

A BODYGUARD steps forward and pushes JIANG YUMAN to the ground.

FU JINGCHEN
(coldly)
Jiang Yuman. Is this what you left me for?

An elegantly dressed woman, YAO SIMENG, gets out of the car.

YAO SIMENG
(contemptuously)
This is her? The one who vanished when the investigators came? Who filed the divorce papers before your sentencing?

JIANG YUMAN
(voice cracking)
Ten thousand. Just ten thousand. The loan sharks-- they'll take my hands.

FU JINGCHEN
You gave up the right to ask for my help when you erased our child.

YAO SIMENG
Jingchen, don't waste your vindication on her.
continuation:
FU JINGCHEN turns to leave.

JIANG YUMAN
Wait! I'll beg. I'll grovel--

FU JINGCHEN
(sternly)
You already did. Two years ago. It was enough.

Several men wielding clubs rush over.

DEBT COLLECTOR
There she is! Don't let her run!

JIANG YUMAN flees in terror. The DEBT COLLECTORS chase after her. She runs blindly into the middle of the road.

A car speeds toward her, its headlights blinding.

BANG! JIANG YUMAN is struck and sent flying, landing in a pool of blood.

The scene freezes, transforming into an illustration in a book.

INT. MODERN APARTMENT - DAY

A READER wearing glasses and pajamas closes the book.

READER
(gleefully)
She got exactly what she deserved. Every last bit of it.

The READER stands, reaching for a water glass. Her foot slips on a wet patch. She falls--

Her head strikes the table corner. The glass shatters.

The book on the floor flips open. White light spills from its pages, enveloping the room.

INT. INSIDE A CAR - DAY

The READER slowly opens her eyes and finds herself in an unfamiliar environment, her face showing confusion.

She looks down at her hands - manicured, unblemished.

Outside the window, a gated estate waits.

She touches her face in the rearview mirror.

JIANG YUMAN's reflection stares back, eyes brimming with dawning horror.

title: Temptation by Design (Episode 51)
description: A woman wakes up in a hospital to find herself recruited into a revenge scheme by her enemy's adoptive brother, who offers her a new identity as his deceased sister.
context:
Title: Temptation by Design (Episode 51)
Description: A woman wakes up in a hospital to find herself recruited into a revenge scheme by her enemy's adoptive brother, who offers her a new identity as his deceased sister.

INT. HOSPITAL WARD - DAY

Sunlight cuts through blinds, striping the sterile room. The FEMALE LEAD stirs, her fingers twitching against white sheets. A heartbeat monitor beeps steadily.

GU SHIYAN sits in shadows, his face half-lit. He leans forward as her eyes flutter open.

GU SHIYAN
(gently)
Welcome back.

The FEMALE LEAD jolts upright, pain flashing across her features. Her hand flies to her bandaged ribs.

FEMALE LEAD
(her voice raw)
Did they—

GU SHIYAN
(interrupting)
He thinks you're dead. The river current helped.

She studies him, her gaze sharpening despite the drugs. She notices his expensive watch, the way he doesn't quite sit like a worried relative.

FEMALE LEAD
You're not a doctor.

GU SHIYAN
(observing her closely)
No. I'm the man who pulled you out. And the man who can put you back in.

A beat. She understands.

FEMALE LEAD
Gu Ruosheng's brother.

GU SHIYAN
(slight nod)
Gu Shiyan. You've done your homework.

FEMALE LEAD
(defensive edge)
When your husband tries to kill you, you learn his enemies.

She winces, touching her throat—fingerprint bruises still visible.

GU SHIYAN
(quietly)
My adopted sister Gu Yan spent twenty-three years in a private facility. Three days ago, she died during an "experimental therapy" session. Her death certificate is still warm.

He slides a leather folder onto her lap. She doesn't open it.

GU SHIYAN
Gu Ruosheng signed the transfer papers himself. Another loose end tied.

FEMALE LEAD
(whisper)
Why would I become someone else's ghost?

GU SHIYAN
Because Gu Yan was heir to fifteen percent of Gu Group shares. Because as her, you can walk into any room. Because I saw your face in the water—calm. Like someone who'd already died and decided to come back anyway.

She finally opens the folder. A photo: a fragile girl with her same build, similar eyes.

FEMALE LEAD
(softly)
I don't know how to be her.

GU SHIYAN
You don't have to. You just have to be angry enough to pretend.

He places a small keycard on the file.

GU SHIYAN
Room 314. Her personal effects. I'll give you tonight to decide if you want to keep breathing as a corpse... or start living as a weapon.

He leaves. She stares at the photo—at the girl who could be her sister, her mirror. Her hands tremble.
continuation:
INT. PRESS CONFERENCE VENUE - DAY

The ballroom hums with camera clicks and hushed greed. The backdrop looms: "Lin-Fu Group Merger."

CEO FU adjusts his black mourning armband, playing the grieving widower. His smile is carefully broken.

Below, GUEST 1 checks his phone, leaning to his companion.

GUEST 1
(quietly)
Lin's stock dropped forty percent since the "accident." Efficient way to clear a boardroom.

GUEST 2
Still. Killing your wife? That's—

GUEST 1
That's what happens when you marry your accountant's daughter.

At the podium, CEO FU taps the microphone. The room hushes.

CEO FU
(voice cracking)
My beloved wife lost her battle with depression. In her memory, I've chosen to merge Lin Group—her family's legacy—with Fu Group. Together, we will honor her by building something stronger.

A FEMALE REPORTER stands, her press badge catching light.

FEMALE REPORTER
CEO Fu, sources claim Fu Group's debt load exceeds assets by three hundred million. They allege this "merger" is asset stripping, and your wife discovered the scheme before her death.

The room holds its breath.

A COLD VOICE cuts through from the back row.

GU YAN (O.S.)
She discovered more than that.

Heads turn. GU YAN rises, wearing Gu Yan's signature ivory blazer. She walks with a limp—the real Gu Yan's childhood injury. CEO FU's face drains.

GU YAN
(approaching slowly)
She discovered the offshore accounts. The falsified therapy records. TheDates. She found out you were going to kill her three weeks before the wedding.

She stops ten feet from the stage, her eyes locked on his.

GU YAN
You even asked if I'd be your maid of honor. Remember?

CEO FU
(stammering)
Gu Yan is—that's impossible, she's—

Suddenly, the projectors flicker. Documents, signatures, therapy dates flash across the backdrop. The flyers aren't thrown—they cascade from the ceiling like judgment.

CLOSE-UP: A photo floats down—CEO FU and a doctor exchanging money outside a psychiatric facility.

GUEST 3
(catching one)
My god. That's his signature on the commitment papers.

GUEST 4
He committed his own sister-in-law?

CEO FU stumbles backward as the papers rain down. One sticks to his shoe: "Patient Gu Yan: Termination Authorization."

GU YAN
(her voice carrying)
You wanted a merger? Here's your paperwork.

Camera flashes strobe like lightning. CEO FU clutches the podium, his ashen face reflecting in the dying projector light.

title: Reborn Heiress Seeks Revenge
description: After dying in a car accident orchestrated by her father and his mistress, a young woman is given a chance to return by a mysterious resurrection system to seek vengeance.
context:
Title: Reborn Heiress Seeks Revenge
Description: After dying in a car accident orchestrated by her father and his mistress, a young woman is given a chance to return by a mysterious resurrection system to seek vengeance.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY

A young man clutches the unconscious WEN YAN (22) against his chest, sprinting through fluorescent-lit corridors. His dress shirt is soaked crimson. Nurses scramble.

YOUNG MAN
Doctor! She's crashing!

CLOSE-UP - WEN YAN's face: blood trickles from her temple, her lips parted in a silent gasp.

YOUNG MAN (V.O.)
(whispered, desperate)
Not like this. Not you too.

INT. PURE WHITE SPACE - DAY

WEN YAN lies on a seamless white platform, her hospital gown pristine. She jolts awake, gasping. No wound. No pain. Just endless white.

She touches her temple—finds only smooth skin.

WEN YAN (V.O.)
Mom... the brakes...

WEN YAN
(looking around, disoriented)
Hello?

A FIGURE materializes—TWELVE, wearing a featureless white suit, his face obscured by a shifting digital mask.

TWELVE
(hostile detected)

WEN YAN
What is this place?

TWELVE
A threshold. You're dead, Wen Yan. Three minutes ago, clinically. Your mother's been gone for seven.

WEN YAN
(staggering to her feet)
No. We were just in the car...

TWELVE
Your father's Mercedes T-boned you at the intersection. He'd cut your brake lines. The same accident is being reported as a tragic loss—mother and daughter—leaving him sole heir.

Wen Yan's breath hitches. She doesn't cry—yet. She goes very still.

WEN YAN
(quiet, dangerous)
Liang Mei.

TWELVE
And her children. Your stepbrother now runs Wen Corporation. Your stepsister is auctioning your mother's art collection tonight.

A tremor runs through Wen Yan's hands. She clenches them into fists.

WEN YAN
Then send me back.

TWELVE
I can't. You're legally deceased. Court approved. Burial plot selected.

WEN YAN
(frustrated)
continuation:
You're a resurrection system. Find a loophole.

TWELVE
Exactly. I don't resurrect bodies. I transplant consciousness. A new host. Someone recently deceased. Someone with access.

WEN YAN
(access?)

TWELVE
Liang Mei's daughter. Liang Xue'er. Overdose. Thirty minutes ago. They haven't found her body yet.

WEN YAN
(eyes narrowing)
Her daughter...

TWELVE
Host compatibility: 97%. Her social circle puts you at the auction tonight. At your father's side. But there's a cost.

WEN YAN
Anything.

TWELVE
You inherit her memories. Her guilt. Her addiction. The system suppresses it, but it's there. And if you fail—if they discover you—true death. For both of us.

Wen Yan looks down at her hands. They shimmer, becoming translucent.

WEN YAN
(softly)
Mom wanted me to live.

She looks up, and for the first time, her eyes are dry. Clear. Focused.

WEN YAN
Let's make them pay for both of us.

TWELVE
Transfer initiating. Don't forget—I'm in your head now. Your only ally.

Twelve's mask dissolves into a cascade of code that swirls around Wen Yan. The white space fractures.

INT. HOSPITAL CORRIDOR - DAY [MEMORY]

Wen Yan's POV: The young man from before—her fiancé, SHENG—holding her dying body. His tears fall on her face.

SHENG (V.O.)
I'll find who did this. I swear.

The memory shatters. The white space implodes.

INT. LUXURY PENTHOUSE - NIGHT

WEN YAN'S EYES snap open. But they're not her eyes anymore. She looks at her reflection in a mirrored ceiling—Liang Xue'er's face, pale, with a fading foam at the corner of her mouth.

WEN YAN (V.O.)
(holding back panic)
Mom... give me strength.

She wipes the foam away. Stands. In the penthouse around her: designer clothes, a family photo—Liang Mei smiling with Chen Dongjie, their perfect family.

WEN YAN
(to herself, testing the voice)
Time for introductions.

She smiles. It's Liang Xue'er's smile. But the hatred behind it is pure Wen Yan.

FADE OUT.

title: The Female Scholar
description: A gifted young woman from a concubine's background excels in both literature and martial arts, earning praise from her tutor and hope for a future in the imperial examinations, but faces jealousy and danger within her own household.
context:
Title: The Female Scholar
Description: A gifted young woman from a concubine's background excels in both literature and martial arts, earning praise from her tutor and hope for a future in the imperial examinations, but faces jealousy and danger within her own household.

INT. YAN RESIDENCE - COURTYARD - DAY

YAN RUYU flows through her forms, sparring with YAN YAOZU. Her flying kick lands with controlled precision, sending him to the ground without injury.

TUTOR ZHAO
(muttering to himself)
Remarkable. She reads three moves ahead.

TUTOR ZHAO steps forward, clapping.

TUTOR ZHAO
Excellent! Brother Yan, your daughter's mind is as sharp as her blade.

MASTER YAN watches from the doorway, pride warring with concern.

MASTER YAN
She does us honor, Teacher.

Several CHILDREN watching from the gate begin to chant:

CHILDREN
Ruyu-jiejie wins again! Ruyu-jiejie wins again!

YAN YAOZU lies on the ground, humiliation burning his face.

YAN YAOZU
(quietly)
This isn't over.

MASTER YAN
(to Tutor Zhao)
It's wasted effort, Teacher. Official careers require more than skill. They require status.

TUTOR ZHAO
The new Emperor values merit above bloodline. I've seen the edicts in draft. Women may yet sit for the examinations.

MASTER YAN's eyes widen. He turns to SU WENPEI, who stands with her tea tray forgotten.

MASTER YAN
Wenpei... did you hear?

SU WENPEI
(voice barely audible)
I hear many things, Master.

YAN RUYU
Father, Tutor Zhao says my essay on water tactics shows promise.

MASTER YAN
(overwhelmed)
Yes. Yes, show him. Teacher, please. Stay for the evening meal. We must discuss this further.

TUTOR ZHAO
The future waits for no man. Or woman.

As they exit, QIN SHUANG appears at the courtyard entrance. Her eyes track them, then settle on her son still on the ground. Her expression hardens.
continuation:
INT. ROOM - NIGHT

YAN RUYU kneels on the floor, her essay scroll in hand. SU WENPEI stands over her, trembling.

SU WENPEI
Do you know your mistake?

YAN RUYU
I controlled the blow. He wasn't injured.

SU WENPEI
You injured something more precious. His place.

YAN RUYU
Father said excellence is the only path for women like me.

SU WENPEI
(fiercely)
NOT. FOR. YOU.

She slaps Yan Ruyu, the crack echoing. Then she collapses beside her, gathering her daughter close.

SU WENPEI
(anguished)
Child, why won't you listen? I hide you to protect you. Every brilliance you show is a target on your back.

YAN RUYU
(pulling back)
Then I'll be too bright to shoot.

SU WENPEI
You cannot outshine the sun. We are swallows under the eaves. We bow our heads, or we are swept away.

YAN RUYU
I won't be swept. And I won't bow.

She pushes free and runs. Su Wenpei crawls after her, falling at QIN SHUANG's feet. Qin Shuang holds a bowl, steam rising like a ghost.

QIN SHUANG
Wenpei, you've raised a phoenix in a sparrow's nest. Master Yan speaks of nothing else. He even mentions... making you his legitimate wife.

SU WENPEI looks up in horror.

SU WENPEI
No... I never wanted...

QIN SHUANG
I know. But your daughter's talents have ambitions of their own. So. You drink this, and she becomes mine. Legitimate, protected, destined for greatness. Or she continues as she is, and I cannot answer for what becomes of either of you.

She holds out the bowl. The liquid within reflects only darkness.

title: Betrayal and Revenge
description: A once-wealthy heir, poisoned and betrayed by his lover and best friend, discovers the horrifying truth behind his terminal illness.
context:
Title: Betrayal and Revenge
Description: A once-wealthy heir, poisoned and betrayed by his lover and best friend, discovers the horrifying truth behind his terminal illness.

INT. RUNDOWN BLACK CLINIC - DAY

Thunder and lightning rage outside. A rat steals chocolate beans from a messy table.

LU HAOSHEN (30s), wearing a stained hospital gown, deathly pale and trembling, lies face down on a rusted bedframe. His fingers—once steady enough to sign million-dollar deals—struggle toward a cracked medicine bowl on the nightstand.

His hand convulses. The bowl shatters on the concrete floor. Bitter medicine pools with blood from his bleeding gums.

LU HAOSHEN rolls off the bed, crawling through the ceramic shards. He scoops the tainted residue with trembling hands, forcing it into his mouth. Blood trickles from his lips.

He moans, eyes fixed on the poison bottle on the table. He inches forward.

A pair of designer heels clicks over, crushing his fingers against the floor.

ZHAO JINGKUN (O.S.)
My God. Is that really you, Haoshen?

JI XIAOXIAO (O.S.)
Three months. You look like a corpse we forgot to bury.

JI XIAOXIAO and ZHAO JINGKUN loom over LU HAOSHEN, their reflections warped in the medicine puddle.

JI XIAOXIAO
(laughing)
Oh, this is precious.

LU HAOSHEN
(weakly)
Xiaoxiao... please. Just enough for one dose.

LU HAOSHEN
The antidote... you know the price. Xiaoxiao, for everything I gave you...

ZHAO JINGKUN kicks his hand away. LU HAOSHEN's fracture from last week screams.

LU HAOSHEN
(moaning)
Ah...!

ZHAO JINGKUN
(crouching, gripping LU HAOSHEN's jaw)
Still begging from her? After you signed over your family's shares? Your penthouse? Tell me, was it my idea or yours to make you my personal ATM?

LU HAOSHEN
(agitated)
I gave you everything. The company, the properties... You said you'd save me. Xiaoxiao, remember? When I bankrolled your 'art career'—when you needed that Taipei gallery—

JI XIAOXIAO
(kicking his ribs, precisely)
That was consulting fee. For teaching a spoiled boy to pretend he had talent. But pigs can't paint, and pigs don't get to marry their owners.

LU HAOSHEN
(desperately)
Our agreement. The transfer documents. You signed them—you promised marriage. A life together.

JI XIAOXIAO
You're a dead man walking. I'd rather burn in hell.

ZHAO JINGKUN
Let's go. The smell of failure is contagious.
continuation:
EXT. OUTSIDE CLINIC - NIGHT

Heavy rain pours. ZHAO JINGKUN hauls LU HAOSHEN by the collar, throwing him into the mud. A final kick to the spine.

LU HAOSHEN
(in pain)
Not possible... the doctors said... autoimmune...

ZHAO JINGKUN
(grabbing LU HAOSHEN's hair)
Autoimmune? Cute. Ever wonder why your 'vitamins' tasted metallic? Xiaoxiao's special thallium blend. Slow. Undetectable. Terminal. She painted the capsules herself.

FLASHBACK: Young LU HAOSHEN paints, chewing his pencil nervously. JI XIAOXIAO beside him gently corrects his grip, her smile warm. She produces a vitamin case. He swallows without looking.

LU HAOSHEN
(shocked)
The... supplements? Three years?

JI XIAOXIAO
(walking over with an umbrella, finally sincere)
I loved watching you trust me. Every morning, like a good little dog.

JI XIAOXIAO and ZHAO JINGKUN kiss—slow, deliberate, inches from LU HAOSHEN's face.

LU HAOSHEN
(heartbroken)
No... not you both. Not since—

JI XIAOXIAO
(triumphantly)
Since university. Your money bought our vacations. Our apartment. This baby.

She touches her stomach. ZHAO JINGKUN covers her hand with his.

ZHAO JINGKUN
(laughing)
Tomorrow's our wedding. Black tie. Your family chapel. We'll save you a seat—if you can crawl.

ZHAO JINGKUN and JI XIAOXIAO leave in the rain, his arm around her shoulders.

LU HAOSHEN lies in the mud, convulsing. Not from poison—from truth.

LU HAOSHEN
Ahhh—!

A red sports car hydroplanes to a stop. The door flies open. GU JIA (28, in a business suit) sprints out, phone already dialing emergency.

GU JIA
(anxiously)
Haoshen! Stay with me—stay—

GU JIA lifts LU HAOSHEN's head from the water. Her ID badge dangles: LU CORPORATION HEAD OF FORENSICS.

GU JIA
I have the lab results. I know what they did.

LU HAOSHEN's eyes focus for the first time in months. He sees her. He sees everything.

LU HAOSHEN loses consciousness as sirens wail in the distance.

title: After the Marriage Swap, My Sister Regrets Everything
description: A successful woman is murdered by her jealous sister at her award ceremony, only to be reborn one year earlier on the day of their arranged marriages, giving her a chance to change their fates.
context:
Title: After the Marriage Swap, My Sister Regrets Everything
Description: A successful woman is murdered by her jealous sister at her award ceremony, only to be reborn one year earlier on the day of their arranged marriages, giving her a chance to change their fates.

INT. AWARD CEREMONY VENUE - NIGHT

Golden confetti rains down. SU LI, elegant in a champagne gown, cradles the Entrepreneur of the Year trophy center stage, her smile genuine but tired.

SU LI (V.O.)
The day I reached the top. Finally.

SU LI traces the trophy's engraving—a moment of quiet triumph. Then her spine straightens. A familiar presence.

SU LI (V.O.)
She couldn't let me have even this.

SU XUE'ER emerges from the wings, stained trench coat over trembling shoulders, a kitchen knife glinting in her white-knuckled grip.

SU LI (V.O.)
My sister. Coming to collect what she thinks I stole.

SU LI's breath catches. She steps back, but the podium blocks her escape.

SU XUE'ER
(whispering, desperate)
It should have been mine.

She lunges. The blade sinks into SU LI's side. No scream—just a sharp exhale. SU LI clutches the wound, crimson blooming between her fingers. She collapses, the trophy clattering beside her.

SU XUE'ER stares at her bloody hands, a sob-choked laugh escaping.

A BODYGUARD vaults onstage, weapon drawn. One shot.

SU XUE'ER jerks, crumples beside her sister. Their eyes lock—one filled with regret, the other with resignation.

ON SCREEN: What if we could choose again?

The image fractures like shattered glass. Time rewinds.

EXT. WEDDING VENUE - DAY

One year earlier. A lavish garden wedding. SU LI and SU XUE'ER stand in identical gowns, but their postures tell different stories—SU LI rigid with duty, SU XUE'ER practically vibrating with anticipation.

SU LI (V.O.)
We stood here once. Before everything burned.

SU XUE'ER beams as she clasps the red silk with JI HAN ZHOU, the tech mogul in his wheelchair, his smile thin and unreadable.
continuation:
INT. HUMBLE WEDDING ROOM - DAY

SU LI sits beside JIANG HAO on a creaking bed, red double happiness peeling at the corners. He offers her tea with careful, calloused hands.

JIANG HAO
(quietly)
I'll make this right. Somehow.

SU LI studies his earnest face, almost believing him.

INT. BOARDROOM - NIGHT

JI HAN ZHOU's empire collapses. Bankers pound the table. SU XUE'ER barges in, hair wild, as a notification lights up her phone: ASSETS FROZEN.

INT. BURNING PENTHOUSE - NIGHT

Flames consume Ji Corporation's headquarters. SU XUE'ER claws at the window, watching her diamond bracelet melt into slag. She laughs, high and broken.

SU XUE'ER
(to the flames)
I chose this! I chose him!

EXT. SNOWY STREET - NIGHT

SU XUE'ER huddles in a designer coat turned inside-out, the label hidden. She shoves her last possession—a gold wedding band—at a street vendor, who tosses it back: "Fake."

INT. AWARD CEREMONY VENUE - DAY

JIANG HAO stands stage-side, filming SU LI's speech on his phone, pride and something like fear in his eyes. She catches his gaze mid-sentence, falters, then smiles for real.

INT. AWARD CEREMONY VENUE - NIGHT

Blood spreads across the stage. SU LI's vision tunnels. Her fingers find the trophy—cold, meaningless.

SU LI (V.O.)
Jiang Hao's empire. My empire. We built it from nothing. She destroyed it from spite.

The shattered glass effect intensifies.

INT. SU FAMILY LIVING ROOM - DAY

SU LI gasps, jerking upright on the sofa. White dress. Living parents. The scent of her mother's perfume—suffocatingly familiar.

SU MOTHER (O.S.)
—listening? Honestly, Su Li, you're so—

SU MOTHER and SU FATHER loom over her, faces rearranged into concerned masks.

SU MOTHER
That poor boy is waiting downstairs. You'll do as you're told.

SU FATHER
(tamping his pipe, not looking up)
Xue'er's made her choice. Don't embarrass us.

SU LI's knuckles whiten on the sofa arm. The phantom pain lingers.

SU LI (V.O.)
The fire. Jiang Hao's first algorithm. The date on the newspaper. All here. All real.

SU MOTHER
(leaning close, voice syrupy)
Be a good daughter. Your sister deserves this chance.

SU LI's eyes lift. Not to her mother—to the family portrait above the mantle. Her own face, carefully blurred in the background.

SU LI (V.O.)
Or maybe I deserve it.

SU LI stands. Her spine straightens with a deliberation that makes her parents exchange a glance.

SU LI
Let me marry Ji Han Zhou.

SU FATHER's pipe freezes mid-tamp. SU MOTHER's smile cracks.

SU XUE'ER appears in the doorway, pink dress too tight, victory already written on her face until she hears the words.

SU XUE'ER
What? No—I'll take Jiang Hao.

Her voice is too quick. Desperate. She catches herself, smooths her expression.

SU XUE'ER
(carefully, to her parents)
He's... more suitable. For me.

SU LI watches her sister twist the narrative. The trophy's phantom weight in her hand. The knife's phantom pain in her side.

SU LI
Then it's settled.

She extends her hand—not to her parents, to SU XUE'ER. A mirror of the red silk ritual.

SU LI
Sisters shouldn't fight over fate.

SU XUE'ER stares at the offered hand like it's a weapon.

title: The Transmigrated Princess's Counterattack Strategy
description: A modern forensic pathologist is transported into the body of a betrayed princess consort who lost everything to a scheming concubine and her cruel husband.
context:
Title: The Transmigrated Princess's Counterattack Strategy
Description: A modern forensic pathologist is transported into the body of a betrayed princess consort who lost everything to a scheming concubine and her cruel husband.

INT. PRINCE'S MANOR BEDROOM - DAY

LING SIWAN sits on the bed, leisurely stirring a bowl of medicinal tonic with a silver spoon.

THE PRINCESS CONSORT kneels on the ground, clothes disheveled, blood at the corner of her mouth, her expression a blend of grief and banked fury.

PRINCESS CONSORT
(coldly)
If it's revenge you want, take it from me. But my child—he's innocent. Give him back.

LING SIWAN
(sinisterly sweet)
Sister, don't be dramatic. You caused my fall—accidents happen. Though I must admit, your child's... gift... has done wonders for my recovery.

The PRINCESS CONSORT's eyes widen with comprehension. She lunges at LING SIWAN, grabbing her throat with trembling hands.

PRINCESS CONSORT
(hoarsely)
You monster.

The PRINCE rushes in and shoves the PRINCESS CONSORT away. She collapses.

PRINCE
(furious, weary)
Still at it? Even now?

PRINCESS CONSORT
(coughing blood, laughing bitterly)
She used our child for her medicine, and you ask if I'm still at it?

MAID
(rushing to support her)
Your Highness, the physician said she mustn't be distressed—her vitals are already—

PRINCE
I don't care! She had an affair and birthed that bastard. She deserves every ounce of this.

PRINCESS CONSORT
(quietly, dangerously)
It was that night. The fire. You were delirious. I carried you out.

LING SIWAN
(feigning shock)
Sister... the stable boy with the lazy eye? Even for a lonely noblewoman, that's desperation. The whole manor knows. Just admit it.

PRINCE
(explosive, embarrassed)
Stop lying! I defended you to the court, to my father. And this is how you repay me?

The PRINCE turns to leave. LING SIWAN walks past, her heel "accidentally" grinding into the PRINCESS CONSORT's hand.

The PRINCESS CONSORT lies motionless, blood pooling beneath her.

PRINCESS CONSORT (V.O.)
Chu Chen'an, when you learn it was my blood that saved you, my body that warmed you that night—regret won't be a sharp enough word.
continuation:
EXT. ANTIQUE ARCHITECTURE PLAZA - DAY

A SCIENTIST sits on a rideable suitcase, watching a short drama, shaking her head.

SCIENTIST
Five episodes of "Chasing Wife to Crematorium" and she hasn't even planted a single piece of forged evidence. Amateur hour.

She accelerates the suitcase, swerving to avoid a CHILD crossing her path while shouting.

SCIENTIST
Watch it! Garbage sorting is a civic duty!

The suitcase clips a stone pillar. The SCIENTIST is launched into the air, strikes her head, and crashes down, unconscious.

PASSERSBY gather.

PASSERBY A
Someone call emergency services!

PASSERBY B
Is she breathing?

The scene flashes between the SCIENTIST's bleeding temple and the PRINCESS CONSORT's lifeless form.

INT. PRINCE'S MANOR BEDROOM - DAY

THE PRINCESS CONSORT lies on the bed, eyes snapping open—cold, clinical, assessing her surroundings like a crime scene.

ON SCREEN: TO BE CONTINUED

title: Revenge of a Grieving Mother
description: A woman plots to destroy her husband and his family after they caused the death of her newborn son through their negligence and cruelty.
context:
Title: Revenge of a Grieving Mother
Description: A woman plots to destroy her husband and his family after they caused the death of her newborn son through their negligence and cruelty.

INT. DIMLY LIT ROOM - NIGHT

QINQIN, a woman in a black business suit, walks determinedly into a dimly lit room. BOSS XU sits behind a desk.

QINQIN (V.O.)
The loan defaults in seven days. By then, every asset we own will be worthless to him.

QINQIN sits down across from BOSS XU.

BOSS XU examines the marriage certificate and property deed, then studies QINQIN.

BOSS XU
You're destroying your own credit to ruin him.

QINQIN
(coldly precise)
He deserves to lose everything.

BOSS XU
What justifies this?

QINQIN
(quiet rage)
His family killed my son. He chose to let it happen.

EXT. PARK - DAY (FLASHBACK)

FIVE MONTHS AGO

QINQIN, eight months pregnant in a blue maternity dress, sits on a park bench speaking softly on her phone.

QINQIN
(on the phone)
Checkup went perfectly. Four weeks to go.

Nearby, SISTER-IN-LAW guides her son JIAHUI on a bicycle.

SISTER-IN-LAW
Jiahui, ease up on the pedals. Gentle turn—yes, like that!

She releases the bike. JIAHUI wobbles, loses control. The bicycle veers toward QINQIN.

JIAHUI
(panicked)
Can't stop!

QINQIN turns. The front wheel strikes her side. QINQIN falls from the bench. JIAHUI topples over.

SISTER-IN-LAW rushes forward, her face flickering between alarm and calculation.

SISTER-IN-LAW
Jiahui!

QINQIN lies curled on the ground, breathing sharply, hands cradling her belly.

QINQIN
The baby...

JIAHUI cries, a shallow scrape on his elbow. SISTER-IN-LAW kneels by him first.

SISTER-IN-LAW
Let me see—just a scratch. You'll be fine.

QINQIN's husband AYUE runs over, his phone still in hand.

AYUE
What happened—Jesus, Qinqin!

He crouches beside QINQIN.
continuation:
QINQIN
(clenched teeth)
Contractions. Something's wrong.

SISTER-IN-LAW
(over her shoulder)
Ayue, Jiahui's arm needs cleaning. The handlebar caught him.

JIAHUI
(whimpering)
Mom, it stings...

QINQIN
We need the hospital. Now.

AYUE
Right—I'll get the car, we can—

SISTER-IN-LAW
(interrupting)
Qinqin's not due for weeks. It's probably false labor from the shock.

QINQIN
(gasping)
This isn't false. I'm bleeding.

SISTER-IN-LAW
(pleading)
Ayue, your brother died when Jiahui was a baby. He's all I have left. Please—just get him checked first. Ten minutes.

AYUE looks between them.

QINQIN
Ayue. Don't leave me here.

SISTER-IN-LAW
(to QINQIN)
You're an adult. You can wait. He's a child.

(to AYUE)
She's fine. Women carry babies through worse. But Jiahui—what if it's worse than it looks?

JIAHUI
(pale)
Mom, I feel dizzy...

SISTER-IN-LAW
See? Ayue, I'm begging you.

She grips AYUE's arm, tears forming.

AYUE
(agonized)
Qinqin... it's just ten minutes. I'll be right back.

QINQIN
(pleading)
Please. I can't stand up.

AYUE
Wait here. I'll send an ambulance from the car.

SISTER-IN-LAW
She doesn't need an ambulance, she needs to breathe. Come on.

SISTER-IN-LAW pulls AYUE up. He looks back once, then guides JIAHUI away, moving faster with each step.

QINQIN watches them leave, clutching her stomach. A dark stain spreads on her dress. Her breathing shallows.

QINQIN
(voice breaking)
It hurts...

She's alone. The phone lies broken beside her.

title: After My Husband Cheated, I Became a Matchmaker
description: A woman discovers her husband and best friend's betrayal while battling terminal illness on a hospital rooftop.
context:
Title: After My Husband Cheated, I Became a Matchmaker
Description: A woman discovers her husband and best friend's betrayal while battling terminal illness on a hospital rooftop.

INT. HOSPITAL ROOFTOP - NIGHT

XUE NING supports SU LI, who is wearing a patient gown and hat, as they walk on the rooftop.

SU LI
Xue Ning, thank you for these nights. I know Yan Li's been working late. You shouldn't have to--

XUE NING
(smiling gently)
What are best friends for? Yan Li wanted tonight to be perfect. He'll be here soon.

XUE NING and SU LI stop at a bench. XUE NING holds SU LI's hand.

XUE NING
We prepared something. Wait by the trellis? He wants to see your face when you see it.

XUE NING leads SU LI to a corner with a decorative trellis, partially hidden by hanging vines. XUE NING makes a "shh" gesture, then turns and leaves.

SU LI leans against the wall, her face showing an expectant smile.

XUE NING walks to the other side. JI YAN LI approaches, and they embrace.

SU LI overhears from her spot. The smile fades.

JI YAN LI
(quietly, to XUE NING)
The lawyer called. Papers are ready.

XUE NING
(softly)
We should wait. She's weaker tonight.

JI YAN LI
We've waited six months. Every day she holds on, we're--
continuation:
XUE NING
(lowered voice)
--I know. But she trusts us.

A beat of silence. Su Li's tears begin. She shifts, and a small decorative stone falls from the ledge.

JI YAN LI and XUE NING turn abruptly.

SU LI staggers out from behind the trellis, clutching her hat.

SU LI
(trembling, but controlled)
Six months.

JI YAN LI
(hesitating, not angry)
Li, you don't understand--

SU LI
(pointing, voice breaking)
I understand perfectly. The late nights. The "gala planning." The way you stopped touching my head when the hair fell out.

JI YAN LI steps forward, not in fury, but panic.

JI YAN LI
Stop. You're making yourself sick--

He reaches for her arm. She jerks back. He grabs harder, instinctively. The hat falls.

SU LI
(different voice)
Let. Go.

She yanks free. Her legs buckle from chemo-weakness, not his force. She goes down, catching herself on the trellis. The hat lies on the ground, bald head exposed.

JI YAN LI stares at his hands. XUE NING moves toward Su Li, then freezes mid-step.

SU LI is on her knees, not crying hysterically, but making a sound like she's dying all over again—quiet, breathless, final.
